name: avatar
description: A user/entity image with a graceful fallback (initials else a Lucide user icon), sized by token (sm/default/lg) and rounded-full. Radix splits Avatar.Root/Image/Fallback; server-side the src is already known so the partial renders the right branch directly (zero JS, CSP-clean). Ships the AvatarGroupCount (the '+N' overflow tile) and AvatarBadge (status dot) child partials. Optional opt-in client image-fallback via data-lv-avatar-fallback wired from the adopter's own TS.
docs: Copies the avatar partial (+ its avatar/group-count and avatar/badge children) to your JTE root at lievit/avatar.jte, reached as @template.lievit.avatar(name=..., src=..., initials=...). Pass size (sm/default/lg); a null/blank src renders the initials-or-user-icon fallback. Build an overlapping stack with a flex -space-x row + a ring cssClass, and close it with @template.lievit.avatar.group-count(count=N); drop a status dot with @template.lievit.avatar.badge inside a relative wrapper. The source is yours: edit freely.
